2604.11491.title: ADD for Multi-Bit Image Watermarking
2604.11491.paper_summary: As generative models enable rapid creation of high-fidelity images, societal concerns about misinformation and authenticity have intensified. A promising remedy is multi-bit image watermarking, which embeds a multi-bit message into an image so that a verifier can later detect whether the image is generated by someone and further identify the source by decoding the embedded message. Existing approaches often fall short in capacity, resilience to common image distortions, and theoretical justification. To address these limitations, we propose ADD (Add, Dot, Decode), a multi-bit image watermarking method with two stages: learning a watermark to be linearly combined with the multi-bit message and added to the image, and decoding through inner products between the watermarked image and the learned watermark. On the standard MS-COCO benchmark, we demonstrate that for the challenging task of 48-bit watermarking, ADD achieves 100\% decoding accuracy, with performance dropping by at most 2\% under a wide range of image distortions, substantially smaller than the 14\% average drop of state-of-the-art methods. In addition, ADD achieves substantial computational gains, with 2-fold faster embedding and 7.4-fold faster decoding than the fastest existing method. We further provide a theoretical analysis explaining why the learned watermark and the corresponding decoding rule are effective.
2604.11491.paper_summary_zh: 隨著生成模型能夠快速創建高保真圖像，社會對於虛假信息和真實性的擔憂加劇。<lb/>一個有前景的解決方案是多位元圖像水印技術，它將多位元信息嵌入圖像中，以便驗證者可以在後期檢測該圖像是否由某人生成，並進一步通過解碼嵌入的信息來識別來源。<lb/>現有的方法在容量、對常見圖像失真的韌性以及理論依據方面往往存在不足。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們提出了ADD（Add, Dot, Decode），這是一種多位元圖像水印方法，分為兩個階段：學習一個水印，將其與多位元信息線性結合並添加到圖像中，以及通過水印圖像與學習到的水印之間的內積進行解碼。<lb/>在標準的MS-COCO基準上，我們展示了在具有挑戰性的48位水印任務中，ADD實現了100\%的解碼準確率，在各種圖像失真下性能最多下降2\%，這大大低於最先進方法的14\%平均下降。此外，ADD在計算上也取得了顯著的增益，嵌入速度比現有最快的方法快2倍，解碼速度快7.4倍。<lb/>我們進一步提供了理論分析，解釋為什麼學習到的水印及其相應的解碼規則是有效的。
2604.11491.author: An Luo et.al.
